title: Subtitle file for only the Japanese text in EoE

wikitext:
[]: Subtitle file for only the Japanese text in EoE             Quote Post by AngelsHalo » Mon Feb 15, 2021 3:22 pm I have a copy of EoE on my hard drive but I really need to add subs for the Japanese text portions only. The sub files that are on my copy will subtitle the text but it also appears for all the spoken English. Does anyone know where I can get a subtitle file that only appears for the Japanese text?

[]: Re: Subtitle file for only the Japanese text in EoE             Quote Post by Berserker » Mon Feb 15, 2021 10:15 pm You can look for it here, I guess: thread/17983/Accurate-End-of-Evangelion-subtitles/
